title: Midday log record (JSONL)
description: Every engine log record is exactly one JSON object per line (JSONL), emitted by core/base/log.* — the single sanctioned logging path. Key order is fixed: ts, level, subsystem, code, message, fields. `ts` is a deterministic monotonic counter (or the sim tick once the tick loop exists) — NEVER wall clock; same build + same inputs must produce byte-identical log streams (determinism contract, spec section 4.3). The core.log.* selftests mirror this schema field-for-field; change both together.

ts.description: Monotonic record counter or sim tick — deterministic, never wall clock.

subsystem.description: Dotted origin of the record, e.g. "core.loader", "core.statechart".

code.description: Stable machine-readable event identifier, dotted lowercase, e.g. "json.parse", "state.voided".

message.description: Human-readable one-line summary; may be empty.

fields.description: Structured, code-specific payload. Omitted entirely when empty.
